properties.entry: DELETE FROM Segment WHERE Segment.channelId IN (:channelIds)

SELECT Segment.* FROM Segment WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM UNNEST(Segment.referencedDataSourceIds) AS referencedDataSourceId WHERE referencedDataSourceId = :referencedDataSourceId ) AND Segment.state <> :state AND Segment.type = :type ORDER BY Segment.id

SELECT Segment.* FROM Segment WHERE ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM UNNEST(Segment.referencedDataSourceIds) AS referencedDataSourceId WHERE referencedDataSourceId = :referencedDataSourceId ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM UNNEST(Segment.referencedFieldMappingFieldNames) AS referencedFieldMappingFieldName WHERE referencedFieldMappingFieldName IN (:referencedFieldMappingFieldNames) ) ) AND Segment.state <> :state AND Segment.type = :type ORDER BY Segment.id

SELECT Segment.* FROM Segment WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM UNNEST(Segment.referencedFieldMappingFieldNames) AS referencedFieldMappingFieldName WHERE referencedFieldMappingFieldName IN (:referencedFieldMappingFieldNames) ) AND Segment.state <> :state AND Segment.type = :type ORDER BY Segment.id
SELECT Segment.id FROM Segment WHERE Segment.filter like :filter
SELECT Segment.name FROM Segment WHERE Segment.channelId = :channelId AND Segment.id IN (:ids) AND Segment.status = :status GROUP BY Segment.name ORDER BY COUNT(Segment.name) DESC
SELECT Segment.name FROM Segment WHERE Segment.id IN (:ids) AND Segment.status = :status GROUP BY Segment.name ORDER BY COUNT(Segment.name) DESC
SELECT Segment.id FROM Segment WHERE Segment.name IN (:names) AND Segment.status = :status GROUP BY Segment.id ORDER BY COUNT(Segment.id) DESC
